login.title: An error has occurred
login.description: The connection to your Behaviour account has failed. Please try again later.

expired.title: Session Expired
expired.description: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

network.title: Network Error
network.description: A network error occurred. Please check your connection and try again.

faq.question0: At what rate the stats will be refreshed?
faq.answer0: Stats are refreshed every 24 hours and are ready at approximately 10h30am UTC. Today’s data is not included until the next refresh.
faq.question1: How does linking and cross-progression stats affect stats availability?
faq.answer1: Linking your account or enabling cross-progression will take up to 24 hours before taking effect.
faq.question2: When did DBD start tracking the player's stats?
faq.answer2: Stats tracking began on September 1st, 2020. Any matches played before this date are not included.
faq.question3: How often the recent match history are updated?
faq.answer3: Recent Match History updates immediately after each match.
faq.question4: What is included in my total matches played?
faq.answer4: "Total matches played" consists of the number of matches you’ve played across all currently supported match types.
faq.question5: What is included in my ''Total Hits''?
faq.answer5: Your "Total Hits" stat consists of the number of Basic and Special Attacks you've landed while playing as a Killer across all currently supported match types

default-page-meta.title: Official Stats Tracker
default-page-meta.description: The Dead by Daylight Official Stats Tracker lets you deep dive into your match history to track kills, escapes, Perk use, character performance, and everything in between.  Enjoy valuable insights on your progress in The Fog.

landing.description: The Dead by Daylight Official Stats Tracker lets you deep dive into your match history to track kills, escapes, Perk use, character performance, and everything in between.  Enjoy valuable insights on your progress in The Fog.
landing.title: Official Stats Tracker
landing.helper: To view stats for a different Behaviour Account, log out of your current account and log back in via the Dead by Daylight Stats Tracker.
